top_signals.title: Fairer taxes for high-value homes
top_signals.summary: The government has launched a consultation on the details of the new High Value Council Tax Surcharge, to make the system fairer for households.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK regulator to require tech firms to tackle deepfakes, non-consensual intimate images
top_signals.summary: The regulator’s announcement said the change is being made due to the “urgent need to better protect women and girls online.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
